clusters.title: What's next for those aboard hantavirus cruise ship?
clusters.neutral_headline: Argentina investigates link to deadly hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
bullet_summary: Three passengers have been evacuated from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak, as related cases are confirmed in Switzerland and South Africa
Three deaths reported from South America-related hantavirus as cruise ship remains off Cape Verde coast
A hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship has killed three people and infected multiple others, officials said
The Andes strain of the virus has been confirmed in some passengers, which can rarely be passed from person to person

items.title: What's next for those aboard hantavirus cruise ship?
items.standfirst: Investigators are racing to control a deadly outbreak of hantavirus, the first ever recorded on a cruise ship. More than 140 people are still on board, including 17 Americans. Tom Hanson reports.
items.content: Investigators are racing to control a deadly outbreak of hantavirus, the first ever recorded on a cruise ship. More than 140 people are still on board, including 17 Americans. Tom Hanson reports.

He was named on Wednesday evening as Martin Anstee, 56. Continue reading...

items.title: 3 patients are being evacuated to Europe from ship with hantavirus outbreak
items.standfirst: Three patients with suspected hantavirus infections were being evacuated from a cruise ship to the Netherlands on Wednesday, the U.N. health agency said, as the vessel at the center of a deadly outbreak remained off Cape Verde with nearly 150 people on board waiting to head to Spain’s Canary Islands.
items.content: Three patients with suspected hantavirus infections were being evacuated from a cruise ship to the Netherlands on Wednesday, the U.N. health agency said, as the vessel at the center of a deadly outbreak remained off Cape Verde with nearly 150 people on board waiting to head to Spain’s Canary Islands.

items.title: Watch: Passengers evacuated from virus-hit cruise ship off Cape Verde
items.standfirst: The Dutch foreign ministry confirmed that a British, German and Dutch national had now been taken from the virus-hit ship.
items.content: The Dutch foreign ministry confirmed that a British, German and Dutch national had now been taken from the virus-hit ship.

items.title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board stranded ship after hantavirus outbreak
items.standfirst: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.
items.content: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

items.title: 3 passengers evacuated from hantavirus-hit cruise ship as new case is confirmed in Switzerland

items.content: Three people were medically evacuated from the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak as a passenger revealed everyone aboard is doing their best to limit contact with one another and follow proper safety protocols.

items.title: What to know about rare person-to-person hantavirus transmission
items.standfirst: The WHO said that some passengers aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship may have been infected with the deadly hantavirus through extremely rare person-to-person transmission.
items.content: The WHO said that some passengers aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship may have been infected with the deadly hantavirus through extremely rare person-to-person transmission.

items.title: Spain says it will harbor cruise ship at center of suspected hantavirus outbreak in its Canary Islands

items.content: The government of Spain said Tuesday that it will receive the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak at one of its ports in the Canary Islands

items.title: British crew member in need of urgent medical care amid suspected hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
items.standfirst: WHO says seven confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus on MV Hondius, including three passengers who diedWhat is hantavirus, the infection thought to have killed three on cruise ship?A British crew member was in need of urgent medical care and a passenger from the UK remained in a critical but stable condition following a suspected outbreak of hantavirus on a luxury cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean.Three people have died and medics on Monday were scrambling to evacuate two others from the MV Hondius, which set off in March from southern Argentina carrying 149 people from 23 countries. The crisis emerged late on Sunday after the World Health Organization (WHO) said it was investigating a suspected outbreak. Continue reading...
items.content: WHO says seven confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus on MV Hondius, including three passengers who diedWhat is hantavirus, the infection thought to have killed three on cruise ship?A British crew member was in need of urgent medical care and a passenger from the UK remained in a critical but stable condition following a suspected outbreak of hantavirus on a luxury cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean.Three people have died and medics on Monday were scrambling to evacuate two others from the MV Hondius, which set off in March from southern Argentina carrying 149 people from 23 countries. The crisis emerged late on Sunday after the World Health Organization (WHO) said it was investigating a suspected outbreak. Continue reading...

clusters.title: CNN founder Ted Turner, a pioneer of cable TV news, dies at 87
clusters.neutral_headline: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
bullet_summary: Ted Turner, the flamboyant US entrepreneur who transformed television news with the creation of CNN in 1980, has died at the age of 87, the network said Wednesday
Ted Turner, the founder of American media giant CNN, has died, the network said on Wednesday

items.title: CNN founder Ted Turner, a pioneer of cable TV news, dies at 87
items.standfirst: Ted Turner, the media maverick and philanthropist who founded CNN, a pioneering 24-hour network that revolutionized television news, died peacefully Wednesday, surrounded by his family, according to a news release from Turner Enterprises. He was 87. [cnn.com]
items.content: Ted Turner, the media maverick and philanthropist who founded CNN, a pioneering 24-hour network that revolutionized television news, died peacefully Wednesday, surrounded by his family, according to a news release from Turner Enterprises. He was 87. [cnn.com]

items.title: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
items.standfirst: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.
items.content: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.

items.title: Flamboyant US entrepreneur and CNN founder Ted Turner dead at 87
items.standfirst: Ted Turner, the flamboyant US entrepreneur who transformed television news with the creation of CNN in 1980, has died at the age of 87, the network said Wednesday.
items.content: Ted Turner, the flamboyant US entrepreneur who transformed television news with the creation of CNN in 1980, has died at the age of 87, the network said Wednesday.

items.title: Ted Turner, CNN founder who reshaped global news, dies aged 87
items.standfirst: The death of the media mogul who transformed TV news was confirmed by his family and reported by CNNTed Turner, the media mogul who founded CNN, has died aged 87, CNN reported on Wednesday, citing a news release from Turner Enterprises.In a statement, Mark Thompson, the chair and CEO of CNN Worldwide, said that “Ted was an intensely involved and committed leader, intrepid, fearless, and always willing to back a hunch and trust his own judgment.” Continue reading...
items.content: The death of the media mogul who transformed TV news was confirmed by his family and reported by CNNTed Turner, the media mogul who founded CNN, has died aged 87, CNN reported on Wednesday, citing a news release from Turner Enterprises.In a statement, Mark Thompson, the chair and CEO of CNN Worldwide, said that “Ted was an intensely involved and committed leader, intrepid, fearless, and always willing to back a hunch and trust his own judgment.” Continue reading...

items.title: CNN’s pioneering founder Ted Turner dies at 87
items.standfirst: Ted Turner, the founder of American media giant CNN, has died, the network said on Wednesday. He was 87.
items.content: Ted Turner, the founder of American media giant CNN, has died, the network said on Wednesday. He was 87.

clusters.title: Why resolute Arsenal will believe prolific PSG can be beaten in final
clusters.neutral_headline: Holders PSG beat Bayern Munich to reach Champions League final with Arsenal
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC Top Stories, Al Jazeera, France24

items.title: Why resolute Arsenal will believe prolific PSG can be beaten in final
items.standfirst: With Paris St-Germain waiting in the Champions League final, will Arsenal withstand the firepower of one of Europe's most formidable attacks and lift the trophy for the first time on 30 May?
items.content: With Paris St-Germain waiting in the Champions League final, will Arsenal withstand the firepower of one of Europe's most formidable attacks and lift the trophy for the first time on 30 May?

items.title: Late Bayern pressure not enough as PSG return to Champions League final
items.standfirst: Harry Kane's injury-time equaliser earns Bayern Munich a 1-1 second leg draw at the Allianz Arena as holders PSG seal their return to the Champions League final 6-5 on aggregate, where they will meet Arsenal in Budapest.
items.content: Harry Kane's injury-time equaliser earns Bayern Munich a 1-1 second leg draw at the Allianz Arena as holders PSG seal their return to the Champions League final 6-5 on aggregate, where they will meet Arsenal in Budapest.

items.title: Holders PSG beat Bayern Munich to reach Champions League final with Arsenal
items.standfirst: Paris Saint-Germain draw the second leg of their semifinal with Bayern Munich 1-1 in Germany to take the tie 6-4.
items.content: Paris Saint-Germain draw the second leg of their semifinal with Bayern Munich 1-1 in Germany to take the tie 6-4.

items.title: Champions League: Title-holders PSG edge Bayern Munich to reach second straight final
items.standfirst: The winners of the 2025 Champions League final will attempt to clinch the trophy a second time – on 30 May against Arsenal – after a 1-1 draw in their semi-final second leg against Bayern Munich on Wednesday sealed a 6-5 aggregate victory.
items.content: The winners of the 2025 Champions League final will attempt to clinch the trophy a second time – on 30 May against Arsenal – after a 1-1 draw in their semi-final second leg against Bayern Munich on Wednesday sealed a 6-5 aggregate victory.

clusters.title: Republicans seek $1 billion in taxpayer dollars for Trump's ballroom
clusters.neutral_headline: Republicans seek $1 billion in taxpayer dollars for Trump's ballroom
bullet_summary: After having the East Wing of the White House torn down, President Trump said a ballroom would be entirely funded by private donations
Reported by CBS News, NPR News

items.title: Republicans seek $1 billion in taxpayer dollars for Trump's ballroom
items.standfirst: After having the East Wing of the White House torn down, President Trump said a ballroom would be entirely funded by private donations. But Republicans are now requesting about $1 billion in taxpayer money for heightened ballroom security.
items.content: After having the East Wing of the White House torn down, President Trump said a ballroom would be entirely funded by private donations. But Republicans are now requesting about $1 billion in taxpayer money for heightened ballroom security.

items.title: Republicans want to add $1 billion for Trump's ballroom security to ICE funding plan
items.standfirst: Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
items.content: Republicans in Congress are proposing $1 billion in funding for security for President Trump's White House ballroom as part of their partisan plan to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement.(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)

clusters.title: Trump would fire Howard Lutnick if he saw video of his Epstein testimony, say House oversight committee Democrats – live
clusters.neutral_headline: Howard Lutnick answers questions from US House over Jeffrey Epstein ties
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian World, CBS News

items.title: Trump would fire Howard Lutnick if he saw video of his Epstein testimony, say House oversight committee Democrats – live
items.standfirst: Ro Khanna criticizes commerce secretary after closed-door interview about ties to Jeffrey Epstein as Democrats call performance ‘embarrassing’Sign up for the Breaking News US emailIt’s worth noting, ahead of Howard Lutnick’s closed-door testimony before House oversight committee members today, that the commerce secretary has refused to answer questions about his ties to Jeffrey Epstein from lawmakers during congressional hearings on Capitol Hill over the last month.In April, Represenative Madeleine Dean, a Democrat from Pennsylvania, asked whether the president expressed “concerns” about the commerce secretary’s relationship with Epstein. Lutnick refused to comment. Continue reading...
items.content: Ro Khanna criticizes commerce secretary after closed-door interview about ties to Jeffrey Epstein as Democrats call performance ‘embarrassing’Sign up for the Breaking News US emailIt’s worth noting, ahead of Howard Lutnick’s closed-door testimony before House oversight committee members today, that the commerce secretary has refused to answer questions about his ties to Jeffrey Epstein from lawmakers during congressional hearings on Capitol Hill over the last month.In April, Represenative Madeleine Dean, a Democrat from Pennsylvania, asked whether the president expressed “concerns” about the commerce secretary’s relationship with Epstein. Lutnick refused to comment. Continue reading...

items.title: What we know about Howard Lutnick's testimony on Epstein relationship
items.standfirst: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick was on Capitol Hill on Wednesday to testify about his relationship with late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. CBS News congressional correspondent Nikole Killion reports.
items.content: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick was on Capitol Hill on Wednesday to testify about his relationship with late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. CBS News congressional correspondent Nikole Killion reports.

items.title: Howard Lutnick answers questions from US House over Jeffrey Epstein ties
items.standfirst: Democrats sharply criticize the US commerce secretary’s testimony, saying he was ‘dishonest’ and should resignThe US commerce secretary, Howard Lutnick, appeared before the House oversight and reform committee on Wednesday to answer questions over his past ties to Jeffrey Epstein.Lutnick agreed in March to sit for a transcribed interview with the committee after the justice department’s release of millions of documents related to Epstein, which included documents showing that Lutnick continued correspondence with Epstein after the disgraced financier had been convicted of soliciting prostitution from a minor. The session is part of the committee’s broader investigation into Epstein. Continue reading...
items.content: Democrats sharply criticize the US commerce secretary’s testimony, saying he was ‘dishonest’ and should resignThe US commerce secretary, Howard Lutnick, appeared before the House oversight and reform committee on Wednesday to answer questions over his past ties to Jeffrey Epstein.Lutnick agreed in March to sit for a transcribed interview with the committee after the justice department’s release of millions of documents related to Epstein, which included documents showing that Lutnick continued correspondence with Epstein after the disgraced financier had been convicted of soliciting prostitution from a minor. The session is part of the committee’s broader investigation into Epstein. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Trump’s abrupt U-turn on plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz came after backlash from allies
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump pauses Hormuz plan 50 hours after he announced it - what happened
bullet_summary: The US president pauses the military operation to get ships through the Strait of Hormuz two days after he announced it
The US president said the operation has been paused after starting on Monday

items.title: Trump’s abrupt U-turn on plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz came after backlash from allies
items.standfirst: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump’s abrupt reversal on his plan to help ships go through the Strait of Hormuz came after a key Gulf ally suspended the U.S. military’s ability to use its bases and airspace to carry out the operation, according to two U.S. officials.
items.content: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump’s abrupt reversal on his plan to help ships go through the Strait of Hormuz came after a key Gulf ally suspended the U.S. military’s ability to use its bases and airspace to carry out the operation, according to two U.S. officials.
